message:
🌱 Memoize StackContext value and stabilize callbacks (#10036)

- Wrap getStackById in useCallback (stable reference)
- Replace selectedStack IIFE with useMemo
- Stabilize demo-mode refetch with useCallback
- Wrap context value in useMemo with proper deps

Eliminates unnecessary re-renders for StackContext consumers
(StackStatusCard, LLMDStackCard) on every provider render cycle.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
